credentials.title: Sign in with email
credentials.description: Enter your Dimplex account email and password to sign in automatically.

auth_code.title: Manual auth code
auth_code.description:
Open this URL in a browser: {auth_url}

Log in, then capture the redirect URL (or just the `code` parameter) from the browser's address bar or DevTools network tab. Paste it below.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate Dimplex Hub
reauth.description: Your authentication has expired. Choose a method to sign in again.

reauth_auth_code.title: Re-authenticate with auth code
reauth_auth_code.description:
Open this URL in a browser: {auth_url}

Log in, capture the redirect URL/code, and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Dimplex service.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
